message:
Fix FrankenContainer z-index layering for proper content stacking

The FrankenContainer's decorative elements (NeuralPulse spark,
FrankenStitch seams) and actual children were all rendered at the
same z-level, causing z-fighting where decorations could render
above card text, buttons, and other interactive content.

Fix establishes a clear three-tier z-index hierarchy:
  - z-0: NeuralPulse traveling spark (deepest, purely decorative)
  - z-10: FrankenStitch seam lines (mid-layer decorative borders)
  - z-20: Children content wrapper (topmost, interactive content)

Children are now wrapped in a <div className="relative z-20 h-full
w-full"> to guarantee they always render above all decorative
elements regardless of their own z-index values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
